input.name: hrmis_contact_info
input.title: Contact must be 11 digits and start with 03

img.style: max-width:100%; max-height:220px; border:1px solid #ddd; padding:6px; border-radius:10px;
max-width:100%; max-height:220px; border:1px solid #ddd; padding:6px; border-radius:10px;

div.t-att-style: 'grid-column: span 6; display:block;' if status_prefill.get('suspension_reporting_to') == 'facility' else 'grid-column: span 6; display:none;'
div.label: DISTRICT *

div.t-att-style: 'grid-column: span 6; display:block;' if status_prefill.get('suspension_reporting_to') == 'facility' else 'grid-column: span 6; display:none;'
div.label: FACILITY *

t.t-if: ('casual' not in lt_name) and ('compensatory' not in lt_name) and ('paid time off' not in lt_name) and ('sick time off' not in lt_name) and ('lpr' not in lt_name) and (lt_name.strip() != 'unpaid') and (emp_gender != 'male' or ('maternity' not in lt_name))

option.t-att-selected: (req.hrmis_designation and req.hrmis_designation.id == des.id) or (current_employee.hrmis_designation and current_employee.hrmis_designation.id == des.id)

div.t-att-style: 'grid-column: span 6; display:block;' if status_prefill.get('onleave_reporting_to') == 'facility' else 'grid-column: span 6; display:none;'
div.label: DISTRICT *

div.t-att-style: 'grid-column: span 6; display:block;' if status_prefill.get('onleave_reporting_to') == 'facility' else 'grid-column: span 6; display:none;'
div.label: FACILITY *

select.name: frontend_eol_institute
select.option: Liaquat University of Medical Health Sciences (LUMHS)
Shaheed Mohtarma Benazir Bhutto Medical University (SMBBMU)
Peoples University of Medical Health Sciences (PUMHSW)
Dr. Ruth K.M. Pfau Civil Hospital
Aga Khan Maternal and Child Care Centre

div.t-att-style: 'grid-column: span 6; display:block;' if status_prefill.get('eol_status') == 'completed' else 'grid-column: span 6; display:none;'
div.label: ENDING DATE

option.t-att-selected: (req.district_id and req.district_id == d.get('id')) or (current_employee.district_id and current_employee.district_id.id == d.get('id'))
str(substantive_facility_prefill_value or '') == str(f.get('id') or '') and substantive_facility_prefill_has_match
(req.hrmis_designation and req.hrmis_designation.id == des.id) or (current_employee.hrmis_designation and current_employee.hrmis_designation.id == des.id)
(req.district_id and req.district_id == d.get('id')) or (current_employee.district_id and current_employee.district_id.id == d.get('id'))
str(substantive_facility_prefill_value or '') == str(f.get('id') or '') and substantive_facility_prefill_has_match
(req.hrmis_designation and req.hrmis_designation.id == des.id) or (current_employee.hrmis_designation and current_employee.hrmis_designation.id == des.id)
(req.hrmis_designation and req.hrmis_designation.id == des.id) or (current_employee.hrmis_designation and current_employee.hrmis_designation.id == des.id)

div.div: Kindly add all previous postings and indicate dates for each posting.

button.title: Remove
button.style: position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #dc3545; background:#dc3545; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;

button.title: Remove
button.style: position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #dc3545; background:#dc3545; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:pointer; text: white

div.style: grid-template-columns: repeat(12, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: gap: 15px 15px; width: 100%

button.title: Remove
button.style: position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #dc3545; background:#dc3545; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;

select.name: qualification_institute_id[]
select.option: Liaquat University of Medical Health Sciences (LUMHS)
Shaheed Mohtarma Benazir Bhutto Medical University (SMBBMU)
Peoples University of Medical Health Sciences (PUMHSW)
Dr. Ruth K.M. Pfau Civil Hospital
Aga Khan Maternal and Child Care Centre

div.t-att-style: 'grid-column: span 6; display:block;' if q.get('status') == 'completed' else 'grid-column: span 6; display:none;'
div.label: END (MONTH/YEAR) *

button.title: Remove
button.style: position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #dc3545; background:#dc3545; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:pointer;

div.div: Kindly indicate dates for each promotion.

button.title: Remove
button.style: position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #dc3545; background:#dc3545; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;

button.title: Remove
button.style: position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #dc3545; background:#dc3545; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:pointer;

div.div: Kindly add only leaves that had a duration of one week or longer.

button.title: Remove
button.style: position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #dc3545; background:#dc3545; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;

t.t-if: ('casual' not in lt_name) and ('compensatory' not in lt_name) and ('paid time off' not in lt_name) and ('sick time off' not in lt_name) and ('lpr' not in lt_name) and (lt_name.strip() != 'unpaid') and (emp_gender != 'male' or ('maternity' not in lt_name))

button.title: Remove
button.style: position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px; width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:10px; border:1px solid #dc3545; background:#dc3545; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; cursor:pointer;

t.t-if: ('casual' not in lt_name) and ('compensatory' not in lt_name) and ('paid time off' not in lt_name) and ('sick time off' not in lt_name) and ('lpr' not in lt_name) and (lt_name.strip() != 'unpaid') and (emp_gender != 'male' or ('maternity' not in lt_name))

input.name: hrmis_leaves_taken
input.style: background:#f3f4f6; color:#6c757d; opacity:0.75; filter: blur(0.15px); width:50%;
input.t-att-value: req.hrmis_leaves_taken if (req and (req.hrmis_leaves_taken is not False)) else (current_employee.hrmis_leaves_taken or 0)

div.p: Please review the information below before submitting.
